body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #1181 

Update the documentation in the `run_amip.jl` driver to reflect recent changes. This still isn't the ideal solution, since a lot of information that was previously in the driver "tutorial" is hidden in the `setup_run.jl` file, but this is all I have time for right now. In the future we should make add a better tutorial to the docs that goes through the steps done in `setup_run.jl`.
title: update driver docs
